unit.title: FC-LS Fabric Login / FLOGI
unit.notes: Seed reading plan derived from FLOGI live QA traces. The plan intentionally decomposes the broad FLOGI question into focused, IR-oriented tasks.

tasks.title: FLOGI ELS envelope and command identity
tasks.reading_goal: Read the generic ELS envelope facts needed to identify FLOGI frames and replies: ELS command location, FLOGI command code, TYPE, R_CTL request/reply values, and single-Exchange scope.
completion_criteria: FLOGI ELS_Command code is grounded.
ELS TYPE and request/reply R_CTL facts are grounded.
Single Exchange request/reply scope is grounded.

tasks.title: FLOGI request, responses, retry branches, and completion
tasks.reading_goal: Read the Fabric Login procedure end to end: request setup, S_ID/D_ID/OX_ID rules, LS_ACC Fabric path, point-to-point LS_ACC path, F_BSY/P_BSY/F_RJT/P_RJT/LS_RJT/no-response/self-connection branches, SOF/Class constraints, and Originator/Responder completion conditions.
completion_criteria: Every response branch on pages 154-155 is represented.
Retry behavior for Class not supported, Invalid S_ID, LS_RJT, and no response is represented.
All Class 1/2/3 Originator and Responder completion conditions are represented.
SOFc1/SOFi1 and Class 6 constraints are represented.

tasks.title: FLOGI/PLOGI/LS_ACC payload layout from Table 149
tasks.reading_goal: Read Table 149 and its lead-in text. Produce word-by-word payload layout claims for Word 0 through Words 64-n, including Payload Bit=0 length, Payload Bit=1 extension fields, Words 21-24 obsolete, Class 6 reuse of Class 1 service parameters, and all conditional/variable-length rules.
completion_criteria: No Table 149 word range is summarized away.
Every word range from Word 0 through Words 64-n has a claim or explicit unresolved item.
Payload Bit 0/1 behavior is grounded.
Class 6 reuse of Class 1 parameters is grounded.

tasks.title: FLOGI Common Service Parameters
tasks.reading_goal: Read Common Service Parameter applicability plus FLOGI request and LS_ACC Common Service Parameters. Cover Table 150, Table 151, and Table 153 with fields, applicability, Payload Bit, Virtual Fabrics bit, R_A_TOV, E_D_TOV, and FLOGI/FLOGI LS_ACC differences.
completion_criteria: FLOGI request Common Service Parameter fields are grounded.
FLOGI LS_ACC Common Service Parameter fields are grounded.
Table 150 continued rows are not missed.
Payload Bit and Virtual Fabrics bit applicability are grounded.

tasks.title: FLOGI Class Service Parameters
tasks.reading_goal: Read FLOGI request and FLOGI LS_ACC Class Service Parameters. Cover Table 156 and Table 158, including Service Options, Initiator/Recipient Control, sequence/credit fields, Open Sequences per Exchange, CR_TOV, and request vs LS_ACC differences.
completion_criteria: Table 156 fields are grounded.
Table 158 fields are grounded.
Request vs LS_ACC differences are explicit.

tasks.title: FLOGI relogin, implicit logout, and FLOGI/FDISC/LOGO side effects
tasks.reading_goal: Read relogin and logout side effects tied to FLOGI. Cover same identity continue behavior, changed N_Port_ID/F_Port_Name/Fabric_Name implicit logout behavior, R_A_TOV wait, NOS/OLS consequences, and Table 148 effects of FLOGI/FDISC/LOGO on Permanent Port Name.
completion_criteria: Same identity relogin continue behavior is grounded.
Changed identity implicit logout plus R_A_TOV behavior is grounded.
Table 148 side effects are represented or explicitly scoped.

tasks.title: FLOGI Virtual Fabrics / EVFP dependency
tasks.reading_goal: Read the Virtual Fabrics dependency that is enabled by FLOGI. Cover Table 177 bit cases, LS_ACC D_ID=000000h behavior, EVFP trigger, interaction with AUTH_ELS/security bit when present, and follow-up FLOGI for logical N_Ports/VFs.
completion_criteria: All Table 177 cases are grounded.
EVFP trigger from FLOGI LS_ACC is grounded.
Authentication/security interaction is grounded when mentioned.
Follow-up logical N_Port FLOGI behavior is grounded.
